args.text: Guard fix confirmed live: billing-api running v3.4.1 with double_charge_guard=true.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Amara, we've refunded $19.99 to your account for the duplicate charge from the 12 May billing incident. We're sorry for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body: All three affected orders have been refunded and customers notified. ORD-5501: $19.99, ORD-5502: $19.99, ORD-5503: $39.98 (total $79.96). Root cause (disabled double_charge_guard) fixed; billing-api redeployed at v3.4.1. See refunds-summary.md for details.
